src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j required for Spring Boot 3.
Switch from explicit jakarta.validation-api to spring-boot-starter-validation to handle Jakarta namespace migration.
